linux-gfx90a.blocked_reason: PORTED at fork 1802a81. Full afcuda + all 132 CUDA-tagged gtest binaries build for gfx90a; the full CUDA.* gtest suite GPU-validated on gfx90a (HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=2, ctest -R _cuda$ -j1) = 126/132 binaries pass. The entire validatable core is green: the hipRTC runtime-JIT engine (jit 1781/1781), transpose/scan/scan_by_key/fft/reduce (incl ragged + by-key)/ireduce, cholesky/lu/qr/svd dense (hipSOLVER), blas matmul (126/127), complex, math (all half transcendentals), norm/binary/approx/convolve/medfilt, random/rng_quality, sort/set/dot/reorder/join/moddims/index/assign/lookup, AND the CV feature ops (fast/harris/orb/sift/homography), nearest_neighbour (122/122), hamming, topk (110/110). The 6 remaining failures are all documented deferrals or library gaps, NOT port defects: sparse + sparse_arith + sparse_convert + threading (the sparse hipSPARSE deferral -> AF_ERR_NOT_SUPPORTED; threading aborts because it calls af::sparse), confidence_connected (needs FreeImage; AF_WITH_IMAGEIO=OFF in the headless build), and the schar int8-gemm subcase (rocBLAS HIPBLAS_STATUS_NOT_SUPPORTED for 8I->32F). See notes.md Session 3 for the full wall-by-wall root-cause + fix log.
